description_long: This is a modern, single-story house surrounded by a high, gray perimeter fence and featuring a spacious yard. The house has a flat, dark roof and a prominent front porch supported by columns, with a stone accent wall adding texture to the facade. A rectangular swimming pool is centrally located in the front yard, bordered by manicured grass and a paved walkway. To one side, there is a wooden pergola structure providing a shaded outdoor area, while the opposite side features a driveway leading to a covered carport. The landscaping includes rows of small trees and garden lights, creating a balanced and contemporary aesthetic. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open outdoor spaces, and functional modern living.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, stone accents, a front porch, a central swimming pool, and a fenced yard with a pergola and carport.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance, porch with columns, stone accent wall, central pool, and the driveway with a car parked under the carport.
description_view_1: This view highlights the symmetrical layout of the yard, the pool, the pergola on the right, and the row of trees along the left fence.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the back of the house, the pergola structure, and the open green space, with the carport and driveway visible on the right.
description_view_3: This side view emphasizes the driveway, carport, and the row of trees, with the pool and pergola partially visible in the background.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large horizontal windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a covered porch with columns, a wide front door, and a stone accent wall, accessed by a paved path and steps.
